zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Idonea De Lacy於1226年出生時，她的父親Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln35歲，母親Alice de l'Aigle31歲。她於1244年與Roger de Camville結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1271年在英國爾瓦布爾頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Idonea De Lacy于1226年出生时，她的父亲Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln35岁，母亲Alice de l'Aigle31岁。她于1244年与Roger de Camville结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1271年在英国爾瓦布爾頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Idonea
meanings: An old baptismal name derived from Latin idoneus, fit, meet, proper.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Idonea De Lacy was born in 1226, her father, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, was 35 and her mother, Alice de l'Aigle, was 31. She married Roger de Camville in 1244. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1271, in Warburton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Idonea De Lacy est née en 1226, son père, Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alice de l'Aigle, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Camville en 1244. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1271, à Warburton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Idonea De Lacyが1226年に生まれた時，父Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincolnは35歳，母Alice de l'Aigleは31歳であった。1244年にRoger de Camvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1271年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーブルトンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Idonea De Lacy(이)가 1226년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de l'Aigle(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1244년 Roger de Camville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1271년 영국 체실르 워버턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Idonea De Lacy родилась в 1226 г., её отцу по имени Sir John de Lacy 2nd Earl of Lincoln было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de l'Aigle, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Camville в 1244 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1271 г. в местности варбуртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.
